body:
It's a lot to take in, friend. Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and Paul Ryan are acting quickly-- and it's going to take every single one of us to resist.
---
[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/grassroots-resistance-goal?refcode=DPE-20170226-JustLaunched_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
It's a lot to take in, Friend:

* Congressional republicans are preparing to put Planned Parenthood on the chopping block
* Donald Trump's cabinet of billionaires is leading agencies they don't support (or in the case of the EPA, are even suing)!
* And Paul Ryan is saying he'll take the first steps to repeal the Affordable Care Act this week

It's enough to make anyone scream at their TV, but we can't throw our hands up now -- just like Elizabeth Warren persisted in the face of Mitch McConnell, we need to do the same. Every. Single. One. Of. Us. That's what it's going to take.

**[So we've set an ambitious grassroots goal of 44,000 donations for February, friend -- and we're asking, will you help us get there? Chip in any amount here >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/grassroots-resistance-goal?refcode=DPE-20170226-JustLaunched_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

| [](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/grassroots-resistance-goal?refcode=DPE-20170226-JustLaunched_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
---

Together, we can demonstrate Democrats are ramping up our efforts, that we are not taking anything for granted in 2018, and that our Senators have a grassroots army standing behind them in the fights ahead.

**[We can't do it without your help, friend -- and we have less than 72 hours to go. Will you take a moment to pitch in whatever you can to help us hit this ambitious goal?](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/grassroots-resistance-goal?refcode=DPE-20170226-JustLaunched_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

With the GOP pushing back on our core values of justice, equality, and progress, sitting on the sidelines just isn't an option.

Thanks for standing with us,
Team DSCC

120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

subject: Stop Bannon: No white supremacist on the National Security Council
body:
Tell Congress: Stop Bannon: No white supremacist on the National Security Council (https://act.credoaction.com/sign/Bannon_NSC_dems/)

The petition to Congress reads:
Donald Trump's decision to seat right-wing white supremacist Steve Bannon on the National Security Council is dangerous for America and the world. Support legislation to keep Bannon off the National Security Council.

Add your name:

(https://act.credoaction.com/sign/Bannon_NSC_dems/)

Dear Activist,

(https://act.credoaction.com/sign/Bannon_NSC_dems/)

Right-wing puppet master Steve Bannon has gotten himself appointed to the inner circle of Trump’s National Security Council (NSC),1, 2 an appointment generally reserved for senior military and intelligence officers.

Bannon, Trump’s anti-Muslim, anti-Semitic, white supremacist, domestic abuser top adviser should not be in the White House at all. However, his seat on the NSC is unheard of, and the consequences for our nation could be horrific.

That’s why we are joining a coalition of progressive organizations to call on Congress to pass legislation removing him from the NSC immediately, before Bannon’s influence becomes even more bloated and dangerous.

Tell Congress: Stop Steve Bannon's national security takeover. Act immediately to remove Bannon from the NSC. (https://act.credoaction.com/sign/Bannon_NSC_dems/)

Trump and his administration have been playing fast, loose and reckless with our security since day one, and the results are horrifying. Trump’s National Security Advisor Michael Flynn resigned in disgrace reportedly lying to the Vice-President and the FBI about his treasonous communications with the Russian ambassador to the United States.3 Flynn’s dangerous behaviour is a symbol of Trump’s poor judgement. His decisions make all of us unsafe, and Bannon’s appointment to the NSC is one of the most dangerous and irresponsible decisions he has made since taking office.

It is clear that in the White House, Bannon is the one running this presidency. He is one of the masterminds behind the unraveling of the Affordable Care Act, the unconstitutional Muslim ban, the anti-immigrant border wall, and the sweeping abortion restrictions coming out of Congress.3 And now, as long as he remains on the NSC, he has the power to say who among us should be protected and who should be targeted.

Bannon believes in the dangerous lie that the United States is at war with Islam and that America should be the center of a new movement of right-wing populism centering on white nationalism.4 He also believes that the apocalypse is coming and a new world order is upon us.5 It is ludicrous that this conspiracy-theory touting white nationalist is guiding our president's actions.

Congress cannot allow a dangerous white supremacist to drive our national security policy. It has the legislative power to stop Bannon. Congress created the NSC and passed legislation regulating it as recently as last year.6 Recently, Representative Stephanie Murphy – a former national security specialist at the Department of Defense and a current member of the House Armed Services Committee – introduced legislation that would protect the independence of the NSC from Bannon’s political meddling by removing him from the council.7

Now is the time for all members of Congress – Democrats and Republicans – to choose a side. They either take a stand against Bannon’s vile racist and xenophobic agenda or they trust our national security to a white nationalist political operative with a reckless, apocalyptic worldview.

We need a massive public outcry to make sure the members of Congress know that we expect them to act in the best interest of our nation. Will you join us in demanding that Congress stop Bannon’s national security takeover and act immediately to remove him from the NSC? Click the link below to sign the petition.

https://act.credoaction.com/sign/Bannon_NSC (https://act.credoaction.com/sign/Bannon_NSC_dems/)

Thank you for fighting back,

Tessa Levine, Campaign Manager
CREDO Action from Working Assets (http://www.credoaction.com)

Add your name:

(https://act.credoaction.com/sign/Bannon_NSC_dems/)

References:
1. Glenn Thrush and Maggie Haberman, “Bannon Is Given Security Role Usually Held for Generals (https://www.nytimes.com/2017/01/29/us/stephen-bannon-donald-trump-national-security-council.html) ,” The New York Times, Jan. 29, 2017.
2. “Report: Trump not fully briefed on exec order that gave Bannon seat at NSC meetings (http://www.foxnews.com/politics/2017/02/06/report-trump-not-fully-briefed-on-exec-order-that-gave-bannon-seat-at-nsc-meetings.html) ,” Fox News, Feb. 6, 2017.
3. Pamela Brown and Eli Watkins, “White House was warned Flynn could be blackmailed by Russia (http://www.cnn.com/2017/02/13/politics/michael-flynn-justice-department-warning/index.html) ,” CNN, Feb. 14, 2017.
4. Zack Beauchamp, “Steve Bannon, the Trump adviser who helped craft the "Muslim ban explained (http://www.vox.com/world/2017/1/29/14431332/steve-bannon-muslim-refugee-ban-explained) ,” Vox, Jan. 29, 2017.
5. Jalal Baig, “Steve Bannon’s war with Islam: Trump may not even understand his adviser’s apocalyptic vision (http://www.salon.com/2017/02/05/steve-bannons-war-with-islam-trump-may-not-even-understand-his-advisers-apocalyptic-vision/) ,” Salon, Feb. 5, 2017.
6. Paul Blumenthal and JM Rieger, “Steve Bannon Believes The Apocalypse Is Coming And War Is Inevitable (http://www.huffingtonpost.com/entry/steve-bannon-apocalypse_us_5898f02ee4b040613138a951) ,” The Huffington Post, Feb. 8, 2017.
7. S.V. Date, “Trump Will Be Limited To A Smaller National Security Council Staff (http://www.huffingtonpost.com/entry/trump-national-security-council_us_5849a372e4b0905b344240a6) ,” The Huffington Post, Dec. 8, 2016.
8. Christina Cauterucci, “Rep. Stephanie Murphy Joins Unofficial Team of Women Against Trump With Anti-Bannon Bill (http://www.slate.com/blogs/xx_factor/2017/02/02/rep_stephanie_murphy_is_trying_to_keep_steve_bannon_off_the_national_security.html) ,” Slate, Feb. 2, 2017.

Post to your wall (http://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=https://act.credoaction.com/sign/Bannon_NSC?source=fb_share4&referring_akid={{user.token}}) (https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?&text=Conspiracy-touting%20racist%20Bannon%20shouldn%27t%20be%20in%20the%20White%20House%20OR%20the%20NSC.%20Remove%20him%20now%3A%20http%3A%2F%2Fbit.ly%2F2l1SncH%20%23p2%20%23PresidentBannon) Tweet this
Post to Twitter (https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?&text=Conspiracy-touting%20racist%20Bannon%20shouldn%27t%20be%20in%20the%20White%20House%20OR%20the%20NSC.%20Remove%20him%20now%3A%20http%3A%2F%2Fbit.ly%2F2l1SncH%20%23p2%20%23PresidentBannon)

Team,
The Supreme Court's ruling on the _Citizens United_ case allowed corporate special interests to spend unlimited amounts of dark money to influence our elections.
In fact, it was thanks to _Citizens United_ that shady Republican groups -- including those tied to Karl Rove and the Koch Brothers -- spent tens of millions of dollars to try to stop Maggie from winning.
We on Team Maggie believe that our democracy should not be for sale to the highest bidder. [**That's why we 're asking you to join us in telling Congress to end _Citizens United_ and stop the influence of dark money in our elections.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd1d/2a380d31/15fe297e/feefcd/1767453475/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://petitions.signforgood.com/endcitizensunited?code=hassan&firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/201702_ecuja")
Republican outside groups have already pledged to spend up to $400 million in dark money to stop Democrats from winning in 2018.
And on the flip side of the coin, one of Senator Hassan's first actions in Congress was to cosponsor a constitutional amendment to overturn _Citizens United_.
But we have to do more. [**Add your name to tell Congress that campaign finance reform can't wait.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd1d/2a380d31/15fe297e/feefcd/1767453475/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://petitions.signforgood.com/endcitizensunited?code=hassan&firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/201702_ecuja")
Thanks for speaking out on the issues that matter.
-- Team Maggie

name: The White House
subject: President Trump's First Joint Address:
body:
Here is everything you need to know: |
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=7f6af662c59b9a5a647bb3ce56ad98c97448ffbc02ff8f90a35b7c71f2751cf9163c45f9975009c7b355105804e020fa50e64d6e5ba203ed ?utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_content=20170227_ADM_JSOC_everything-need-to-know-email

President Donald J. Trump will be delivering his first address to a Joint Session of Congress on Tuesday, February 28, 2017. Be sure to tune in as the President will be sharing his vision for the country.

When: Tuesday, February 28, 2017, at 9 p.m.

Where: The United States Capitol in the House Chamber, also known as the "Hall of the House of Representatives.”

Who: The President will address Members of both the House of Representatives and Senate in his first address to a Joint Session of Congress.

The Speech: President Trump is keeping the tradition of previous Presidents by delivering a formal address to a Joint Session of Congress during his inaugural year, and will deliver his first State of the Union address in 2018. The President will deliver his speech from the Speaker’s rostrum.

How to watch: The address will be streamed live at
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e9e26b73ea22cf390457262cb53122914cb827953405b07cc1c5312366daa0dd6fd6c85150ebe1a0746728bc6b3ce6204fde873051af4e69
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=7f6af662c59b9a5ab1fbebc518e64bb2e0761f20330ef26c9e217e73227fffe457e197c60033e11d3fa4864a76fedd28258dc523509539a2

How to participate: Follow along live on Twitter
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e9e26b73ea22cf394389ec067bc94e2f083dcb5b777d4074b923de2a27b24658ccb9d872f717571960fff0606fe21766cfc063139c0b6759
@WhiteHouse and
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=7f6af662c59b9a5a252689ce0c3dd386f70d39e16be490ddf3e7a2bc80eadbdc81886230e33c60678ad0c1385a35c0613db7fa9a4fd66417
@POTUS for real-time information before, during and after the speech. The speech will also be live streamed at
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=7f6af662c59b9a5ab29001ad02784024928b5d303c7e4a43f0ba399f1aa987e7653e854158b218b03aeca93587584767e60575c453ddd731
facebook.com/WhiteHouse.

"This will be an opportunity for the people and their representatives to hear directly from our new President about his vision and our shared agenda." - Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives, Paul D. Ryan

During his first Joint Address to Congress, the President will communicate his vision for the future of the country directly to the American people as he moves forward with his plans to take on the many challenges facing this nation. Building on his
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=7f6af662c59b9a5ae33c5ca6cc7468b1f564eb50f2d3d7992395df1426a29aa14d6ee4e9e6e6bb1ae6f6a99a2b78e0730257b53d0f35d428
inaugural address , President Trump will continue to lay out his agenda to Make America Great Again.

In just one month, President Trump's Administration has already accomplished so much, including the following:

- Reviving key job-creating energy projects such as the Keystone XL and Dakota Access pipelines.
- Eliminating costly Obama-era regulations such as the “Stream Protection Rule.”
- Minimizing the economic burden of Obamacare while clearing the path toward repeal and replace.
- Directing the Department of Defense to develop a plan to defeat ISIS.
- Standing with American workers by withdrawing from the disastrous Trans-Pacific Partnership.
- Enacting common sense regulatory reform by ordering any new regulations be offset by the repeal of two other regulations.
- Building his Cabinet and Administration with the highest quality individuals to help implement the President's vision for the country.
- Establishing new ethics commitments for all executive branch appointees to enforce a five-year lobbying ban and a permanent ban on lobbying for foreign governments.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=7f6af662c59b9a5a149f2bab4604bf89714512543757e2b7d64fb9be7eb405d3bde173b18da588a27390b99be58988e42fa24ce06132c8dd
Find out more about the President's Executive Actions

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=7f6af662c59b9a5a3a310b15100a405c08ebe1785bd18453f406a395606b97f3c454cf167289078c19cc888ccb7dbe6be1f42e60076e150b
View the legislation President Trump has signed into law

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=7f6af662c59b9a5ac757027804ace0b447af38f013456ed409bca337295ead3696382e0c904a68e21e085c4241513dd01d963e6ec3c9e62a
The President's Cabinet

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=7f6af662c59b9a5aa6dc68cea73f8d63ccd2552506eda2c7d6d093d68bdc6a24d9434317acac5404a3d390b26c9092174705e8c9c5734824
Privacy Policy

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=7f6af662c59b9a5a662d4ca8a21fa4e5c3abecd250c16dd056ef51005341c715aad2debfe4596bcfdc1ed04be4d27fb814725e622f2840ed
Contact the White House
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4e60e022b7d0c8dabab59faeadc4f6104ea1172cc49fb74ccb76ccf702f08a941da12a9226438eb8b19828e356691d2ba

name: Roy Cooper
subject: We need Republican leaders to come back to the negotiating table
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
This is a major, multi-year investment in our teachers -- it puts our money where our trust is.
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202999/2fde7c66/4381ef8f/15691475/1188278292/VEsH/ "https://https://medium.com/@NC_Governor/we-need-republican-leaders-to-come-back-to-the-negotiating-table-bec37a38731a#.ekg1twcs2")
---
Friends, There is urgency in the air in Raleigh. If we don't repeal HB2 soon, North Carolina will be shut out of hosting NCAA championships for the next several years. People are urging me and the legislature to work this out. [**I think we can, but we have to work to find common ground to repeal House Bill 2. ****Read more about the path forward here:**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202999/2fde7c66/4381ef8f/15691474/1188278292/VEsE/ "http://medium.com/@NC_Governor/we-need-republican-leaders-to-come-back-to-the-negotiating-table-bec37a38731a#.k9ccv6lcn") [****](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202999/2fde7c66/4381ef8f/15691474/1188278292/VEsF/ "http://medium.com/@NC_Governor/we-need-republican-leaders-to-come-back-to-the-negotiating-table-bec37a38731a#.k9ccv6lcn") After recently proposing my own solution to repeal HB2, Rep. Chuck McGrady has introduced a different proposal that includes a provision for referendum votes. I have two concerns with this. First, it subjects the rights of the minority to a vote of the majority. It would be like putting the Civil Rights Act to a popular vote in cities in the South during the 1960s. Except today, it would come with the perils of modern campaigns. Which is my second concern. Imagine the endless campaigning -- months of one side demonizing the other about whether LGBT citizens have rights. Toxic 30-second TV ads. Nasty mail filling up your mailbox. And North Carolina is still in the national news for all the wrong reasons. Let's be clear. Today Republican super-majorities control the legislature. They could repeal HB2 without a single Democratic vote. I have proposed multiple compromises. House Speaker Tim Moore has been publicly silent. But I'll work to bring every single Democratic legislator to support an effective compromise that does not include a referendum. Time is running short, but we can reach an agreement -- if Speaker Moore provides leadership to his own caucus. **Call Speaker Moore and urge him to come back to the negotiating table: 919-733-3451.** Thanks for all you continue to do, Roy

* * *

Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
---

Roy Cooper for North Carolina
PO Box 1190
Raleigh NC 27602 United States

This email was sent to:
dpwillis67@gmail.com

[http://act.roycooper.com/unsubscribe](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202999/2fde7c66/4381ef8f/15691477/1188278292/VEsC/ "http://act.roycooper.com/unsubscribe")

They could repeal HB2 without a single Democratic vote. I have proposed multiple compromises. House Speaker Tim Moore has been publicly silent. But I'll work to bring every single Democratic legislator to support an effective compromise that does not include a referendum. Time is running short, but we can reach an agreement -- if Speaker Moore provides leadership to his own caucus. Call Speaker Moore and urge him to come back to the negotiating table: 919-733-3451. Thanks for all you continue to do, Roy * Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Roy Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh NC 27602 United States

body:
We're delivering our own resistance address to the nation.
#
Sisters and Brothers,
On Tuesday, Donald Trump will give an address in front of a joint session of Congress. We're joining with activists and community partners to deliver our own resistance address to the nation, rejecting Trump's agenda of discrimination and devastation. [**Will you join us at our rally on Tuesday to send a message that Trump can't ignore?**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a0b/43f17890/21afd25e/62002160/1132395788/VEsH/ "http://go.ourrevolution.com/page/signup/or-resistance-address?source=em170227-dc")

Tuesday, February 28 at 6 p.m.
Lafayette Square
16th & H Streets, NW
Washington, DC 20005

Senate Democrats didn't wait to resist. They brought your voice to the floor. They stalled Trump's nominees (even knocking out Puzder). And they're waging all of these fights head-on to check Trump's power.

But at a time we need to show support for our Senators' efforts, we are still far short of hitting our goal of 44,000 donations before the FEC deadline. We're counting on your help to get there.

name: Democrats.org
subject: NEW GOAL: 60,000 grassroots donations by tomorrow night
body:
Help us meet our donation goal before tomorrow's deadline
---
**Pitch in $3 or whatever you can to help us reach our new 60,000 donation goal before tomorrow's deadline:
**[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c5dc/4067b0a/2d506b4c4/7e7c2c07/776361777/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/February-Goal-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170227_ew_nd&source=em_20170227_ew_nd&refcode=em_20170227_ew_nd")****
Senators and representatives are back in Washington this week. Did you see your Republican member of Congress while they were at home?

There's a good chance that the answer is no, because most Republicans spent the past week dodging constituents who want to protect affordable health care and hold the Trump administration accountable.

Case in point:

Instead of meeting with North Carolinians, Sen. Thom Tillis visited Texas in search of an excuse to pay for Trump's wall.

When one of Sen. Marco Rubio's constituents confronted his senator to ask him to host another town hall, Rubio ran away -- and then hopped on a plane to Europe.

Nevada Sen. Dean Heller said he'd only hold a town hall if there was "no applauding and no booing." (Yes, that's a sitting U.S. Senator who's afraid of a little bit of clapping.)

And then there's Texas Rep. Louie Gohmert. He had the audacity to use the shooting of Gabby Giffords to justify skipping in-person town halls. Her response, to him and the rest of the GOP: "Have some courage."

Republicans think they can dodge their constituents without facing any consequences. Let's send them a message they can't ignore: 60,000 donations this month to elect Democrats.

Before tomorrow's deadline, pitch in $3 or more to help us hit our goal.

**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.

Did you see your Republican member of Congress while they were at home? Republicans think they can dodge their constituents without facing any consequences. Let's send them a message they can't ignore: 60,000 donations this month to elect Democrats. name: Jay Inslee
subject: SIGN: We knew this wasn’t over
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Washington will not bend to this. [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MTA1MTczMDgS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTEwMjIwMDM0MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
| Dear Friend, Earlier this month, we proved that blatant discriminatory actions on the part of the Trump administration won't be able to stand on meritless ground. We beat Trump in court. He lost. Now we know how sore of a loser he is. We knew this fight wouldn't be over. In addition to urging ICE to carry out raids that deport countless non-criminal immigrants, we know that President Trump is writing a new executive order aimed at immigrants and refugees. While we don't yet know the details of Trump's new executive order, we know that Washington will never become a place of exclusion, no matter how much President Trump tries to take away people's constitutional rights. That's why I signed an executive order for Washington last week reaffirming our status as a place where immigrants' rights will be protected. And I'm asking you to show that you agree with me. **[Sign on to support my executive order affirming Washington's commitment to welcoming all people.](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MTA1MTczMDgS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTEwMjIwMDM0MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)** Washington has always been, and will always remain, a place that welcomes and embraces people of all faiths, all nationalities, and all orientations. This executive order makes clear that Washington will not be a willing participant in promoting or carrying out mean-spirited policies that break up families and compromise our national security and community safety. Thank you for standing with me. Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [**SIGN ON »**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MTA1MTczMDgS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTEwMjIwMDM0MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Jeanne Shaheen and Maggie Hassan revealed their intent over the weekend to eliminate the Electoral College because they don't like the outcome of the 2016 election. Gov. Chris Sununu and GOP Chair Jeanie Forrester have defended New Hampshire from Shaheen and Hassan's liberal attacks in a new WMUR story (below). Will you help share it? CLICK HERE ( ) to see Jeanie Forrester's Tweet. If you are on Twitter, please retweet her! In addition, if you are on Facebook, CLICK HERE ( ) to see Jeanie Forrester's Facebook post. Please LIKE and SHARE her post! Thanks for your help. It's very important that we expose Sens. Shaheen and Hassan's plan to disenfranchise New Hampshire voters. Patrick Hynes Senior Adviser WMUR Sununu, Forrester Blast Senators for Opposing Electoral College ( ) By John DiStaso February 27, 2017 ( ) ( ) ( ) ( ) footer image

name: Kate Black, EMILY's List
subject: Over 9,000 women are the key to beating this >>
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c73a7/24c69fd9/f6da6806/18e0c117/1057519228/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE229N_digital_email_20170227_StateAttacks_n-all&source=WQEFE229N_digital_email_20170227_StateAttacks_n-all")
---

Peter,

Last month alone, 167 anti-choice bills were introduced by anti-choice politicians across the country.

If you do the math, that's about 5 new anti-choice proposals A DAY.

It's outrageous, it's offensive, and it's unacceptable, for sure. But it's also a big reason we launched Run to Win to recruit and elect women to state and local offices who will fight back.

**[If we're going to halt the wave of anti-choice attacks, we need the resources to support the thousands of women who've told us they're ready to run. Donate $3 to help hit our $125,000 End-of-Month goal and get their backs.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c73a7/24c69fd9/f6da6806/18e0c110/1057519228/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170225_email_EOM?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+If+were+going+to+halt+the+wave+of+antich&utm_campaign=WQEFE229N_digital_email_20170227_StateAttacks_n-all&source=WQEFE229N_digital_email_20170227_StateAttacks_n-all")**

Since Election Day 2016, more than 9,000 women have reached out to EMILY's List about learning how to run for office. We've literally never seen anything like it.

These women are desperately needed if we're going to put an end to anti-choice attacks like Arkansas's bill allowing family members and partners to sue abortion providers, North Dakota's attempt to ban abortion as early as six weeks (before most women even know they're pregnant), or the constant attempts to defund Planned Parenthood coming from state legislatures.

It only stops if we elect more pro-choice Democratic women at every level. It's not a small mission, so our fundraising goals aren't small either.

**Donate $3 before February is over to make sure we can support pro-choice Democratic women running for office across the country:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Feb-End-of-Month](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c73a7/24c69fd9/f6da6806/18e0c111/1057519228/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170225_email_EOM?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgFebEndofMonth&utm_campaign=WQEFE229N_digital_email_20170227_StateAttacks_n-all&source=WQEFE229N_digital_email_20170227_StateAttacks_n-all")**

Thanks,

Kate Black
Vice President of Research, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c73a7/24c69fd9/f6da6806/18e0c112/1057519228/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170225_email_EOM?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WQEFE229N_digital_email_20170227_StateAttacks_n-all&source=WQEFE229N_digital_email_20170227_StateAttacks_n-all")

body:
We are officially in the second month of Donald Trump's presidency. And it's clear that the news alerts won't end any time soon. In many ways, this fight is just beginning. | _Invite for dpwillis67@gmail.com to join our Grassroots Action Network.
[**Ready to fight Trump 's extreme agenda? Activate NOW >>**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b3a/70cdc2ba/474ff0e1/397e80a/2206684227/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sign2017cvh?refcode=em022717&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Ready+to+fight+Trumprsquos+extreme+agend&utm_campaign=em022727&source=em022727")_
We are officially in the second month of Donald Trump's presidency. And it's clear that the news alerts won't end any time soon. In many ways, this fight is just beginning.

Up next: the budget battle. In the budget Trump submits to Congress this week we can expect huge and unwarranted increases in military spending that will be offset by drastic cuts to critical investments in education and other vital priorities, an effort to gut the Environmental Protection Agency, and a plan to defund Planned Parenthood.

Congressional Republicans have wanted to dismantle many domestic agencies for years, but until now they did not have a president in the White House who would let them do that. But we will not back down.

[**Chris Van Hollen is fighting tooth-and-nail but needs your help. Click here to join his Grassroots Action Network now >> **](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b3a/70cdc2ba/474ff0e1/397e80b/2206684227/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sign2017cvh?refcode=em022717&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Chris+Van+Hollen+is+fighting+toothandnai&utm_campaign=em022727&source=em022727")
[](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b3a/70cdc2ba/474ff0e1/397e808/2206684227/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sign2017cvh?refcode=em022717&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=em022727&source=em022727")

It's important to not only stay alert, but to also organize with others to amplify our message. Just last night, Chris joined two thousand Marylanders at a _Keep on Fighting Rally_ in Silver Spring. Things are going to continue developing rather quickly and it is on us to hold Team Trump and the GOP accountable.

[**Join Chris and recommit to keeping up the fight for our American values. Add your name now to join his Grassroots Action Network >> **](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b3a/70cdc2ba/474ff0e1/397e809/2206684227/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sign2017cvh?refcode=em022717&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+Join+Chris+and+recommit+to+keeping+up+th&utm_campaign=em022727&source=em022727") __
